name: commitsmith
description: Forge Conventional Commits messages from your git diff with one click — using any OpenAI-compatible API or a fully local Ollama model.

enumDescriptions: OpenAI-compatible. Calls {baseUrl}/chat/completions (OpenAI, OpenRouter, LM Studio, Open WebUI). Requires an API key for remote endpoints.
Ollama. Calls {baseUrl}/api/chat so num_ctx can be set (avoids silent prompt truncation). No API key required.
commitsmith.api.markdownDescription:
API protocol. `openai` calls `{baseUrl}/chat/completions` (OpenAI, OpenRouter, LM Studio, Open WebUI). `ollama` calls `{baseUrl}/api/chat` so the context window (`num_ctx`) can be set — required to avoid silent prompt truncation on Ollama.

Tip: run **Commitsmith: Select API Provider** from the Command Palette or the Source Control `⋯` menu to switch quickly. Ollama needs no API key.

commitsmith.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL. OpenAI: `https://api.openai.com/v1`. Ollama: `http://localhost:11434`. Open WebUI: `https://your-host/api`.

commitsmith.model.markdownDescription: Model name. Hosted: `gpt-4o-mini`. Local (Ollama): a small code model like `qwen2.5-coder:3b` (latency) or `:7b` (quality).

commitsmith.temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Low values give stable Conventional Commits output.

commitsmith.maxDiffTokens.description: Token budget for the diff context in the single-call path. The diff is truncated (whole hunks, per-file proportional) to fit.

commitsmith.largeDiffThreshold.description: Post-filter diff token count above which the two-pass (summarize-then-synthesize) strategy is used.

commitsmith.maxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens for the generated message.

commitsmith.ollamaNumCtx.description: Context window (num_ctx) for Ollama /api/chat calls. Prevents Ollama's 2048-token default from silently truncating the prompt.

commitsmith.requestTimeoutMs.description: Request timeout in milliseconds. Generous by default to absorb Ollama cold-start model loading.

commitsmith.systemPrompt.description: Override the default system prompt. Leave empty to use the built-in Conventional Commits prompt.

commitsmith.ignoreGlobs.description: Files whose diff body is dropped from the prompt (still listed in the change summary). Reduces noise and token cost.
